briefdescription.para: Time elapsed since the last frame, in seconds.
Time elapsed since the first frame, in seconds.
Immutable snapshot of input state for the current frame.
Reference to the current game session for state tracking.
Sink for pushing phase-level events during update.

detaileddescription.para: Used by systems and components to publish events (e.g., collision, spawn requests) that will be processed in the next phase of the game loop.

briefdescription.para: Source for reading phase-level events from the previous phase.
Sink for pushing pass-level events during update.

detaileddescription.para: Used by systems and components to publish events that will be processed in subsequent passes within the same phase, after a commit point.

briefdescription.para: Source for reading pass-level events from previous passes.
Sink for pushing frame-level events during update.

detaileddescription.para: Used by systems and components to publish events that will be processed in the next frame. Frame-level events persist across all phases and are swapped at the end of the Post phase.

briefdescription.para: Source for reading frame-level events from the previous frame.
Immutable snapshot of all viewport states for this frame.
Reference to the ResourceRegistry for O(1) resource lookup.
Callable for resolving EntityHandles to GameObjects.
Pointer to the active Level, or nullptr if no level is loaded.

memberdef.argsstring: (helios::engine::runtime::world::ResourceRegistry &resourceRegistry, helios::engine::ecs::EntityResolver entityResolver, helios::engine::runtime::world::Session &session, const float deltaTime, const float totalTime, helios::engine::runtime::messaging::event::GameLoopEventBus &phaseEventBus, helios::engine::runtime::messaging::event::GameLoopEventBus &passEventBus, helios::engine::runtime::messaging::event::GameLoopEventBus &frameEventBus, const helios::input::InputSnapshot &inputSnapshot, std::span< const helios::rendering::ViewportSnapshot > viewportSnapshots, const Level *level)
memberdef.name: UpdateContext

briefdescription.para: Constructs an UpdateContext with all per-frame dependencies.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to the ResourceRegistry for resource lookup.
Callable for resolving EntityHandles to GameObjects.
Reference to the current game session.
Time since last frame in seconds.
Accumulated time since the first frame in seconds.
Reference to the phase-level event bus.
Reference to the pass-level event bus.
Reference to the frame-level event bus.
Immutable input state for this frame.
Immutable snapshot of viewport states.
Pointer to the active Level, or nullptr.

briefdescription.para: Returns the viewport snapshots for this frame.

simplesect.para: A span of const ViewportSnapshot objects.

briefdescription.para: Returns the time elapsed since the last frame, in seconds.
Returns the time elapsed since the first frame, in seconds.
Returns the immutable input snapshot for this frame.

simplesect.para: Const ref to the current InputSnapshot.

briefdescription.para: Returns the ResourceRegistry for resource lookup.
Returns the ResourceRegistry for resource lookup.
Resolves an EntityHandle to a GameObject.

detaileddescription.para: Validates the handle via the EntityResolver and returns a lightweight GameObject wrapper if the entity is still alive.

parameterdescription.para: The entity handle to resolve.

simplesect.para: A GameObject if the handle is valid, std::nullopt otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns the EntityResolver for direct handle validation.
Returns the active Level.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the Level, or nullptr if no level is loaded.

briefdescription.para: Returns the EngineCommandBuffer for submitting commands.

detaileddescription.para: Shortcut for `resourceRegistry().resource<EngineCommandBuffer>()`. Only accepts engine-defined command types. For custom commands, look up the appropriate handler or buffer via `resourceRegistry()` directly.

briefdescription.para: Returns the session for game/match state access.

simplesect.para: Ref to the Session used with this UpdateContext.

briefdescription.para: Pushes an event to the pass-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Events pushed here become readable in subsequent passes within the same phase, after a commit point is reached.

parameterdescription.para: The event type to push.
Constructor argument types for the event.
Arguments forwarded to the event constructor.

briefdescription.para: Pushes an event to the phase-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Events pushed here become readable in subsequent phases, after the current phase commits.

parameterdescription.para: The event type to push.
Constructor argument types for the event.
Arguments forwarded to the event constructor.

briefdescription.para: Reads events from the phase-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Returns events that were pushed during the previous phase via `pushPhase()`. The phase event bus is swapped at phase boundaries, configured in GameLoop::phaseCommit().

parameterdescription.para: The event type to read.

simplesect.para: A span of const events of type E.

briefdescription.para: Reads events from the pass-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Returns events that were pushed during previous passes within the current phase via `pushPass()`. The pass event bus is swapped at commit points, configured via Pass::addCommitPoint().

parameterdescription.para: The event type to read.

simplesect.para: A span of const events of type E.

briefdescription.para: Reads events from the frame-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Returns events that were pushed during the previous frame via `pushFrame()`. The frame event bus is swapped at the end of the Post phase, making events readable in the subsequent frame.

Frame-level events are useful for cross-frame communication, such as:
Collision events that trigger effects in the next frame
Spawn confirmations for UI updates
Audio/VFX triggers

parameterdescription.para: The event type to read.

simplesect.para: A span of const events of type E.

briefdescription.para: Pushes an event to the frame-level event bus.

detaileddescription.para: Events pushed here become readable in the next frame via `readFrame()`. The frame event bus is swapped at the end of the Post phase in GameLoop.
Use frame-level events for cross-frame communication where events should persist beyond the current phase.

parameterdescription.para: The event type to push.
Constructor argument types for the event.
Arguments forwarded to the event constructor.

briefdescription.para: Creates a View for querying entities with the given component types.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience shortcut that avoids accessing the GameWorld directly. Delegates to the EntityManager owned by the EntityResolver.

parameterdescription.para: The component types to query.

simplesect.para: A View over all entities possessing every requested component.

briefdescription.para: Creates a View for querying entities with the given component types.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience shortcut that avoids accessing the GameWorld directly. Delegates to the EntityManager owned by the EntityResolver.

parameterdescription.para: The component types to query.

simplesect.para: A View over all entities possessing every requested component.
